hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; case "$FILE" in *.py) python3 -m ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true;; esac
case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in requirements.txt|poetry.lock|Pipfile.lock|uv.lock) echo 'BLOCKED: Do not edit lockfiles directly. Use pip install / poetry add / uv add instead.' >&2; exit 2;; esac
